mapper.select: SELECT p.ID AS id, b.NAME AS name, p.TITLE AS title, u.NAME AS authorName, p.CREATED_AT AS createdAt FROM TF_POST p JOIN TF_BOARD b ON p.BOARD_ID = b.ID JOIN TF_USER u ON p.AUTHOR_USER_ID = u.EMPNO ORDER BY p.ID DESC

SELECT p.ID AS id, p.BOARD_ID AS boardId, b.NAME AS name, p.TITLE AS title, p.CONTENT AS content, u.NAME AS authorName, p.AUTHOR_USER_ID AS authorUserId, p.CREATED_AT AS createdAt FROM TF_POST p JOIN TF_BOARD b ON p.BOARD_ID = b.ID JOIN TF_USER u ON p.AUTHOR_USER_ID = u.EMPNO WHERE p.ID = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TF_POST ( ID, BOARD_ID, AUTHOR_USER_ID, TITLE, CONTENT, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( SEQ_TF_POST_PK.nextval, #{boardId}, #{authorUserId}, #{title}, #{content}, SYSDATE )
